title: coelogyne speciosa subsp. speciosa
intro: Coelogyne speciosa subsp. speciosa, also known as the showy coelogyne, is a species of orchid native to Southeast Asia. The plant is traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which help to treat various health conditions such as fever, respiratory infections, and wounds. The health benefits of Coelogyne speciosa subsp. speciosa include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce pain and inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and flowers are often dried and made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
